mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.user_id as userId, v.title, v.description, v.video_url as videoUrl, v.thumbnail_url as thumbnailUrl, v.duration, v.view_count as viewCount, v.deleted_yn as deletedYn, v.created_at as createdAt, v.updated_at as updatedAt, u.username as writerName, u.profile_image as writerProfileImage FROM videos v JOIN users u ON v.user_id = u.id WHERE v.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY v.created_at DESC

SELECT v.id, v.user_id as userId, v.title, v.description, v.video_url as videoUrl, v.thumbnail_url as thumbnailUrl, v.view_count as viewCount, u.username as writerName FROM videos v JOIN users u ON v.user_id = u.id WHERE v.id = #{id} AND v.deleted_yn = 'N'

SELECT id, user_id as userId, title, description, video_url as videoUrl, thumbnail_url as thumbnailUrl, view_count as viewCount, deleted_yn as deletedYn, created_at as createdAt FROM videos WHERE (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR description LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id as userId, -- 💡 DB는 user_id, 엔티티는 userId이므로 'as' 필수! title, description, video_url as videoUrl, thumbnail_url as thumbnailUrl, view_count as viewCount, deleted_yn as deletedYn, created_at as createdAt FROM videos WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC
